An '''unnamed [[Senator/Legends|senator]]''' represented [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi]] in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]]. 

In [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], he requested the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] send a communications team to the [[Artus_Prime_Mining_Facility|mining colony]] of [[Artus Prime]], which had gone silent after reporting the discovery of a large deposit of [[Artusian crystal]]s. Per the Senator's request, a [[Supply_ship/Legends|supply ship]] was sent there. Unknown to them, the mines had been captured by the [[Empire Reborn]]; as apparently did the ship bearing the communications crew, since it disappeared at the [[Outer_Rim_Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].<ref name="N.R.I. Reports">{{LucasArts|url=products/outcast/html/spin.html|text=N.R.I. Reports|int=N.R.I. Reports}}</ref><ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''</ref>

In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], another unnamed, possibly identical, senator from Bilbringi was bribed by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] during the [[New Republic Presidential election, 28 ABY|Chief of State election]]. This senator sat on the [[Senate Defense Council/Legends|Defense Council]].

==Behind the scenes==
The ''[[N.R.I. Reports]]'' and ''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' were both released in [[2002]]. This indicated that the unnamed politician is presumably a running gag.
